channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Lawyer for news organizations presses Guantanamo judge to make public a plea deal for 9/11 accused
item.description: A lawyer for news organizations has urged the U.S. military commission at Guantanamo Bay to unseal the plea deal struck with accused 9/11 mastermind Khalid Sheikh Mohammed and two others.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Knickmeyer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Are male voters reluctant to vote for a woman? Harris' backers are confronting the question head on
item.description: The concern has been there all along, but now it's being talked about openly: Are some men reluctant to vote for Kamala Harris because she’s a woman.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert And Zeke Miller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NYC pursuing thousands of hotel rooms to house migrants amid multibillion-dollar costs: report
item.description: The city of New York needs 14,000 beds for migrants next year, according to a report, as the city continues to grapple with the migrant crisis.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump swipes at Detroit during speech in Motor City
item.description: Former President Donald Trump on Thursday bashed the city of Detroit as a “mess” and called it a developing area during a speech in the Motor City.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Battle to shore up bases remains as Election Day nears
item.description: MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst and his guest talks about deadly conflicts in the Middle East and how those have factored into domestic politics. Plus, we follow up with two Generation Z voters about how they’re approaching the election.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, Matthew Alvarez, and Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Trump, Harris locked in dead heat in 7 battleground states, poll finds: 'Could not be closer'
item.description: A Wall Street Journal poll has found almost no separation between former President Trump and Vice President Kamala Harris among voters in swing states.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Speculation continues over Cuomo run for NYC mayor
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There has been growing speculation this week that former Gov. Andrew Cuomo is rapidly approaching a decision about whether or not to run for New York City mayor.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Republican NY-18 candidate Alison Esposito says America doesn’t have a gun problem
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Alison Esposito, a Republican candidate running for Congress in New York’s 18th District, said she does not support a ban on assault weapons and that America doesn’t have a gun problem. Esposito made the comments during a debate against Democratic U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: The presidential campaigns have made over 200 visits but speak to just a fraction of American voters
item.description: The nation's unique Electoral College system for electing a president, which replaces the popular vote, puts disproportionate voting power in the hands of a relative few states.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: WATCH: Candidates for Las Vegas Mayor face off in a debate ahead of Election Day
item.description: Las Vegas Mayoral candidates Shelley Berkley and Victoria Seaman will face off in a debate on Tuesday, hosted by 8 News Now, with the winner taking over the non-partisan office from Oscar Goodman, who served as mayor from 1999 to 2011.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: DeSantis pushes back on 'delusional' Harris remark about Hurricane Milton calls
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) said Monday that it was “delusional” for Vice President Kamala Harris to accuse him of “political gamesmanship” after reports emerged that he did not take the Democratic presidential nominee’s calls as his state braces for Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Uvalde city officials release missing footage from officers responding to 2022 Robb Elementary shooting
item.description: The new videos largely affirm prior reporting and investigations that detailed law enforcement’s failures to confront the gunman who killed 19 children and two teachers.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Lomi Kriel And Lexi Churchill, The Texas Tribune And Propublica, And Zach Despart, Terri Langford And Pooja Salhotra, The Texas Tribune, KPRC 2

item.title: Harris leads Trump among California Latino voters by 23 points
item.description: Vice President Harris holds a strong lead over former President Trump among California Hispanics, according to a Telemundo poll released Tuesday. The California survey contrasts with a similar poll released earlier this month of Florida Hispanic voters, which found Trump leading Harris.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, Fox 5

item.title: Fact checking falsehoods about FEMA funding and Hurricane Helene
item.description: Rumors, misinformation and lies about the federal government’s response to Hurricane Helene have run rampant since the storm made landfall, especially around FEMA funding.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler, MPR News

item.title: Supreme Court won’t hear Pennsylvania legislators' challenge to executive actions expanding voting access
item.description: The Supreme Court decided Monday it won’t take up a case to restore a lawsuit by Pennsylvania Republicans that challenged executive actions expanding voting access on the basis that only state legislatures can regulate federal elections.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Supreme Court won't hear arguments in Texas emergency abortion case
item.description: The Supreme Court decided not to hear arguments in a case involving Texas that could have provided an answer about whether a state abortion ban conflicts with a federal emergency care law.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, Fox 5

item.title: Trump intends to use military to round up opponents: Michael Cohen
item.description: “The big warning that I want people to understand is when Donald Trump says something, stop sane washing it. Stop trying to make it into something which has some normalcy to it. What he says, he intends to do.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Texas students with immigrant parents lost out on college aid because of FAFSA glitch
item.description: The glitch kept the students from submitting the form on time, which put them last in line to receive aid this year.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Sneha Dey, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump returns to site of attempted assassination, honors shooting victims
item.description: Former President Donald Trump is returning Saturday to the site of his attempted assassination with a rally in Butler County.
item.dc:creator: Patty Coller, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump urges his supporters to deliver victory in his return to scene of first assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump returned on Saturday to the Pennsylvania fairgrounds where he was nearly assassinated in July, urging a large crowd to deliver an Election Day victory that he tied to his survival of the shooting.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, JILL COLVIN and ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, Fox 5
